llm_instruction: Use this file only after a candidate job was selected. Copy the BASF URL exactly from job.url; never construct job links.

job.title: Legal Intern
job.description: Objectives: We are looking for a legal intern who will provide a wide range of administrative and secretarial support as well as legal support in order to effectively facilitate daily operations of China Legal team. Job Descriptions: • Track new legislations, conduct Legal research on various legal topics and draft legal memos • Translate and proof-read bilingual legal documents • Draft, review basic contracts and other legal documents • Schedule appointments, make arrangement for meetings, workshops, etc • Assist in preparing charts, meeting minutes and presentation slides and other materials for China Legal team • Collect, summarize and consolidate relevant business and legal data into reports, and establish and maintain paper filing and e-filing systems for China Legal team • Provide support with general guidance on a variety of legal projects and activities • Support other paralegal and administrative tasks assigned by Vice President, Team Leaders or Counsels in Legal Department Job Requirements: • Education: Student with legal education background, major in law preferable • Working Experience: Not required • Technical Professional Knowledge: Fluent in both oral and written English; proficient in MS office tools • Team player and highly responsible work attitude, good communication and interpersonal skills • Proactive, diligent and understand business and operation needs of the organization. • Preferred Internship Period - 6 months internship (3-5days attendance per week, full attendance is preferable) 请时刻警惕任何可能的招聘欺诈行为！请注意，巴斯夫绝不会在任何情况下向候选人以任何形式收取任何费用。
